project_context.name: SMERA - Sony Music Licensing Platform
project_context.focus: RLM Fase 1 - Detalhe do Processo Workflow

classes.heading_lg: font-sora text-3xl md:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white
classes.heading_md: font-sora text-xl md:text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white
classes.overline: font-sora text-[10px] md:text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-400 font-medium

sticky_summary_header.layout: Fixed header pinned to the top of the workflow detail view.
sticky_summary_header.container_classes: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full glass-dark border-b border-white/10 px-6 py-4 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4
sticky_summary_header.content_left: Uses Flex column. Overline: Project Name. Heading: Track Title (Sora, text-2xl, white). Subtext: Artist Name (Jakarta, text-zinc-400). Badges: ISRC/GRID IDs.
sticky_summary_header.content_right: Uses Flex row. Displays Total % Allocation (Large, tracking-tight, Sora) - color codes green if 100%, amber if under. Stage Badge showing current active stage and responsible role.

stepper.container_classes: flex items-center w-full overflow-x-auto py-6 gap-2 hide-scrollbar
stepper.node_classes: relative flex flex-col items-center gap-3 shrink-0 min-w-[80px] cursor-pointer
stepper.circle_classes: w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-jakarta font-medium transition-all duration-300 z-10

states.current: bg-[#E60012] text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(230,0,18,0.4)] ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#050505] ring-[#E60012]/50
states.viewed: If a user is viewing a step different from 'current', add: ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#050505] ring-white/60 to the circle.

stepper.connecting_line: flex-1 h-[1px] bg-zinc-800 min-w-[40px] absolute top-4 left-[50%] right-[-50%] -z-0

cards_and_spacing.card_obsidian: bg-[#121212] border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-lg shadow-black/50 transition-colors duration-300 hover:border-zinc-700
cards_and_spacing.section_spacing: gap-8 or gap-12 between main vertical sections (e.g., Stepper -> Stage Panel -> History).
cards_and_spacing.density_grouping: Instead of floating form inputs, wrap related inputs in subtle sub-panels (bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-lg p-5 border border-zinc-800/50) with their own eyebrows/overlines.

custom_ui.allocation_bar: w-full h-2 md:h-3 rounded-full bg-zinc-800 overflow-hidden flex. Main artist gets bg-[#E60012], other participants get distinct subtle colors (zinc-500, zinc-600).
custom_ui.btn_sony: bg-[#E60012] hover:bg-[#FF1A2D] text-white font-jakarta text-sm px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md transition-all shadow-md shadow-[#E60012]/20 active:scale-95 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E60012]/50
custom_ui.btn_sony_outline: bg-transparent border border-[#E60012] text-[#E60012] hover:bg-[#E60012]/10 font-jakarta text-sm px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E60012]/50
custom_ui.input_obsidian: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-zinc-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2.5 text-white focus:border-[#E60012] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E60012] transition-colors font-jakarta text-sm
custom_ui.table_header: font-sora text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-400 bg-[#1A1A1A] border-b border-zinc-800 px-4 py-3 text-left

framer_motion.page_load: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut' }}
framer_motion.stagger_children: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}
framer_motion.item_fade_up: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 10 }, show: { opacity: 1, y: 0 } }}
framer_motion.stepper_line_fill: Use motion.div for the connecting line to animate width from 0% to 100% when a step is completed.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
